title: Urgent Opening Real Estate Agent at Liases Foras

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Real Estate Agent at Liases Foras
jsonLd.description:
Liases Foras, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Real Estate Agent for our Indore operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Liases Foras:
Liases Foras is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Contract Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Flexible working hours
• Professional development and training programs
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Liases Foras!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
